name: Immigration Intake — AI Visa Classification + Clio

parameters.content:
## Immigration Intake Workflow

**What this does:**
1. Receives an intake form submission via webhook (any fields accepted)
2. Sends the data to OpenAI GPT-4o — classifies the US visa type, extracts structured client info, generates a document checklist
3. Creates a Clio Contact
4. Opens a Clio Matter
5. Attaches the AI-generated document checklist as a Note
6. Sends the client a confirmation email with next steps

**Credentials needed (all built into n8n — no community nodes required):**
- **OpenAI API** — standard API key
- **Clio API Token** — create a Header Auth credential:
  - Name: `Authorization`
  - Value: `Bearer <your-token>`
  - Get your token: Clio → Settings → API Keys → Generate Token
- **SMTP** — your email sending credentials

**Works on n8n Cloud and self-hosted.**

**Built by [Beamreach](https://beamreach.ai/immigration-law-automation.html)**

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ data: Object.assign({ name: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.clientName, type: 'Person', first_name: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.clientFirstName, last_name: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.clientLastName }, $('Parse AI Response').item.json.clientEmail   ? { primary_email_address: { name: 'Work', address: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.clientEmail } } : {}, $('Parse AI Response').item.json.clientPhone   ? { phone_numbers: [{ name: 'Mobile', number: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.clientPhone, default_number: true }] } : {}) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ data: { description: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.matterDescription, status: 'Pending', client: { id: $json.data.id }} }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ data: { subject: 'Immigration Intake — AI Summary & Document Checklist', detail: '**VISA CLASSIFICATION**
Category: ' + $('Parse AI Response').item.json.visaCategory + ($('Parse AI Response').item.json.visaSubcategory ? ' (' + $('Parse AI Response').item.json.visaSubcategory + ')' : '') + '
Confidence: ' + $('Parse AI Response').item.json.confidence + '
Urgency: ' + $('Parse AI Response').item.json.urgency + '

**REASONING**
' + $('Parse AI Response').item.json.reasoning + '

**ALTERNATIVE PATHWAYS**
' + ($('Parse AI Response').item.json.alternativePathways || 'None identified') + '

**DOCUMENT CHECKLIST**
' + $('Parse AI Response').item.json.documentChecklistText + '

**ATTORNEY NOTES**
' + ($('Parse AI Response').item.json.notes || 'None') + '

---
Generated automatically by Beamreach Immigration Intake Workflow.', matter: { id: $json.data.id }} }) }}

parameters.subject: We received your immigration inquiry — here's what happens next
parameters.message:
=

Thank you for reaching out

Dear {{ $('Parse AI Response').item.json.clientFirstName || $('Parse AI Response').item.json.clientName }},

We have received your immigration inquiry and our team will review it shortly.

Preliminary Assessment

Based on the information you provided, your situation may qualify under {{ $('Parse AI Response').item.json.visaCategory }}.

This is an automated preliminary assessment only — not legal advice. Our attorneys will confirm the appropriate pathway during your consultation.

Documents to Prepare

To make your consultation as productive as possible, please begin gathering the following documents:

    {{ $('Parse AI Response').item.json.documentChecklistText.split('\n').map(line => '
  1. ' + line.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '') + '
    2. ').join('\n') }}

Next Steps

  1. One of our attorneys will contact you within 1-2 business days to schedule a consultation.
  2. Please gather the documents listed above before the consultation.
  3. Bring any prior immigration notices, visas, or court documents to the consultation.

If you have an urgent matter (removal proceedings, expired status, imminent travel), please reply to this email or call us directly.

Best regards,
Your Immigration Law Firm
attorneys@yourfirm.com

This email was generated automatically. The preliminary visa classification above is not legal advice and does not create an attorney-client relationship.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "ok", "message": "Intake received. A member of our team will contact you within 1-2 business days.", "reference": "{{ $('Clio — Open Matter').item.json.data.display_number }}" }
